productName: Tasty Terps - TT BHO 1g - Red Zkittlez - 1g
description: This hybrid BHO concentrate distills Red Zkittlez down to its potent essence through precision closed-loop extraction and a clean solvent purge. Smooth and high-potency, a sweet candy-fruit aroma with a calm, happy, relaxed feel, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
